base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of projectile_ice_beam — a projectile (special_attack_proj) from 1986 metroid. Ice Beam — 4-frame cyan crystalline projectile. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Ice Beam — 4-frame cyan crystalline projectile; freezes enemies into platforms (required to defeat Metroids); can be combined with Wave in NAR (Non-Action-Replay?) variants
